# Data Dictionary

## Observation data tables
```{r data-dict-obs}
dat_dict_obs <- fread("data/ap_monitor_data_master_data_dictionary.csv")
knitr::kable(dat_dict_obs)
```

## Location data tables

```{r data-dict-locations}
dat_dict_locations <- fread("data/ap_monitor_locations_master_data_dictionary.csv")

knitr::kable(dat_dict_locations[State == "all", .(Column, Definition)])
```

```{r data-dict-locations-ste, results = "asis"}
for (i in c("act", "nt", "nsw", "qld", "sa", "tas", "wa", "vic")){
  cat("###", toupper(i), "specific\n\n")
  
  print(knitr::kable(dat_dict_locations[State == i, .(Column, Definition)]))
}
```
